name: ANAVEX LIFE SCIENCES CORP.
summary: Anavex Life Sciences Corp. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing precision medicine therapeutics for central nervous system diseases including Alzheimer's disease, Parkinson's disease, Rett syndrome, schizophrenia, and other neurodegenerative and neurodevelopmental disorders. Its lead compound, ANAVEX 2-73 (blarcamesine), targets sigma-1 and muscarinic receptors and is in multiple clinical trials. A second compound, ANAVEX 3-71, is in one clinical trial. The company uses genomic biomarker analysis and AI-driven machine learning to support precision medicine approaches.
